violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The hand-washing sink by the chocolate production area was observed filled with water and had dishes to be cleaned within the basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Items were removed from sink during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

The presence of small flies and rodents is not controlled as evidenced by live activity and droppings in the back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door reach-in. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2024
